name: Carlos Macau, Jr.
background: Carlos L. Macau, Jr. has served as HEICO’s Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since 2012. Prior to joining HEICO, he was a partner at Deloitte & Touche LLP.

company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer
